description: Strategy section redesign with cover images, dedicated edit pages, and a community marketplace for sharing, voting, and downloading strategies

userStories.title: Extend Strategy Schema for Marketplace
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to extend the strategies table with marketplace-related fields so that strategies can be shared publicly with proper attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Add coverImageUrl column (text, nullable) to strategies table
Add coverImageKey column (text, nullable) for S3 object key
Add isAnonymous column (boolean, default false) - hide creator identity
Add instruments column (text[], nullable) - array of instruments
Add categoryTags column (text[], nullable) - array of category tags

userStories.title: Create Strategy Votes Table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a votes table to track user votes on public strategies so that we can calculate net scores and prevent duplicate voting.
acceptanceCriteria: Create strategyVotes table with columns: id (text PK), strategyId (FK), userId (FK), vote (integer: 1 or -1), createdAt, updatedAt
Add unique index on (strategyId, userId) - one vote per user per strategy
Add relations to strategies and users

userStories.title: Create Strategy Downloads Table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a downloads table to track which users have copied which strategies so that we can show download counts and prevent counting duplicates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create strategyDownloads table with columns: id (text PK), originalStrategyId (FK), copiedStrategyId (FK), userId (FK), createdAt
Add index on originalStrategyId for counting downloads
Add unique index on (originalStrategyId, userId) - one download per user
Add sourceStrategyId column to strategies table (text, nullable, FK) - links copy to original
Add cachedStats column to strategies table (jsonb, nullable) - cached performance metrics
Add relations to strategies and users

userStories.title: Create Strategy Reports Table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reports table to track user-reported strategies so that we can handle misleading or inappropriate content.
acceptanceCriteria: Create strategyReports table with columns: id (text PK), strategyId (FK), reporterId (FK), reason (enum), details (text nullable), status (enum default pending), createdAt, reviewedAt (nullable)
Add index on strategyId for querying reports per strategy
Add index on status for admin queue filtering
Add unique index on (strategyId, reporterId) - one report per user per strategy
Add relations to strategies and users

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want centralized constants for marketplace-related values so that they're not hardcoded across the codebase.
acceptanceCriteria: Export STRATEGY_INSTRUMENTS array with ES, NQ, MES, MNQ, YM, RTY, CL, GC, EUR/USD, GBP/USD, USD/JPY, Other
Export STRATEGY_CATEGORIES array with Scalping, Day Trading, Swing Trading, Breakout, Reversal, Trend Following, Mean Reversion, News Trading, ICT/SMC, Other
Export STRATEGY_REPORT_REASONS: misleading_stats, inappropriate_content, spam, other

userStories.title: Add Strategy Cover Image Upload Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an API endpoint to get presigned URLs for strategy cover image uploads so that users can add visual identity to their strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add getImageUploadUrl mutation to strategies router
Input: { strategyId: string, filename: string, mimeType: string, size: number }
Validates file is image type (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/gif)
Returns { presignedUrl: string, publicUrl: string, key: string }

userStories.title: Update Strategy Mutation for Cover Image
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want the strategy update mutation to accept cover image fields so that I can save the URL after upload completes.
acceptanceCriteria: Extend updateStrategySchema to accept coverImageUrl (string, optional)
Extend updateStrategySchema to accept coverImageKey (string, optional)
Update mutation handles cover image fields
If cover image key changes and old key exists, delete old S3 object

userStories.title: Add Strategy Auto-Save Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an auto-save endpoint that debounces updates so that changes persist automatically without explicit save actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add autosave mutation to strategies router
Uses same validation as update but accepts partial fields
Returns { updatedAt: Date } for UI confirmation
Does not trigger cache invalidation (silent save)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Cover Image and Auto-Save
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the cover image upload and auto-save endpoints so that we can verify correct behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Test getImageUploadUrl: returns presigned URL for valid image request
Test getImageUploadUrl: rejects non-image mime types
Test getImageUploadUrl: rejects if not strategy owner
Test autosave: updates strategy fields correctly
Test autosave: rejects if not strategy owner
Test cover image fields in update mutation
userStories.notes: Tests validate S3 not configured behavior in test env, Zod schema validation, autosave mutations, and cover image fields

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Visibility Endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want endpoints to publish/unpublish strategies to the marketplace so that users can control visibility of their strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add publish mutation: sets isPublic true, accepts isAnonymous, instruments, categoryTags
Add unpublish mutation: sets isPublic false
Validates strategy has required fields for publishing (name, description)
Enforces minimum trade count: rejects if strategy has < MIN_TRADES_TO_PUBLISH (20) closed trades
On publish, compute and cache stats in cachedStats column (win rate, profit factor, total trades, avg R)
Returns updated strategy with computed stats
userStories.notes: Added publish and unpublish mutations with validation, stats computation using shared analytics module

userStories.title: Add Marketplace Listing Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an endpoint to list public strategies for the marketplace page so that users can browse available strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add marketplace.list query (new router or sub-router)
Input: { cursor?, limit?, search?, instruments?, categories?, sort? }
Returns paginated list with: strategy fields, creator info (or null if anonymous), stats from cachedStats, engagement (voteScore, downloadCount), hasVoted, trackRecordStatus
No auth required for listing, auth optional for hasVoted
userStories.notes: Created marketplace router with list query using publicProcedure for optional auth

userStories.title: Add Strategy Voting Endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want endpoints to upvote, downvote, and remove votes so that users can rate strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add vote mutation: { strategyId: string, vote: 1 | -1 }
Uses upsert pattern (vote replaces existing vote)
Rate limiting via Upstash Redis: Max 20 votes per user per hour using @upstash/ratelimit with sliding window
userStories.notes: Added vote and removeVote mutations with Upstash rate limiting (20/hour sliding window)

userStories.title: Add Strategy Download/Copy Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an endpoint to copy a public strategy to my account so that I can use strategies shared by others.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates new strategy as copy: name (with Copy suffix), description, color, coverImageUrl, entryCriteria, exitRules, riskParameters, scalingRules, trailingRules, strategyRules
Sets sourceStrategyId to original strategy ID
Does NOT copy coverImageKey (user doesn't own that S3 object)
Creates strategyDownload record linking original to copy
userStories.notes: Added download mutation to marketplace router with copy creation, sourceStrategyId linking, and download record tracking

userStories.title: Add Strategy Report Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an endpoint to report inappropriate or misleading strategies so that the community can flag problematic content.
acceptanceCriteria: Add report mutation: { strategyId: string, reason: ReportReason, details?: string }
Validates strategy exists and is public
Cannot report same strategy twice (one report per user per strategy)
Creates strategyReport record with status pending
userStories.notes: Added report mutation to marketplace router with validation for public strategies, duplicate report checks

userStories.title: Add Public Strategy Detail Endpoint
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want an endpoint to get full details of a public strategy so that users can view complete information before downloading.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns strategy with all fields (same as private getById)
Includes vote score and download count
No auth required (auth optional for vote status)
userStories.notes: Added marketplace.getById query using publicProcedure for optional auth, includes strategy with rules, creator info, vote score, download count, and user vote status

userStories.title: Add Cached Stats Refresh Logic
userStories.description: As a system, I want strategy stats to refresh when trades are closed so that marketplace stats stay accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: When a trade is closed (in trades.close or trades.update to closed status), check if trade's strategy is public
If public, recompute stats and update cachedStats column
Stats to compute: totalTrades, wins, losses, winRate, profitFactor, avgR, avgWin, avgLoss
Update trackRecordStatus based on new trade count
Use a helper function computeStrategyStats(strategyId) for reuse
userStories.notes: Created strategy-stats.ts helper with computeAndCacheStrategyStats and refreshStrategyStatsIfPublic functions. Integrated into trades router: close, update, delete, restore, and updateStrategy mutations all refresh stats for public strategies.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Marketplace Backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for all marketplace endpoints so that we can verify correct behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Test publish: sets isPublic, computes and caches stats, rejects incomplete strategies, rejects strategies with < 20 trades
Test marketplace.list: returns paginated public strategies, filters work, includes trackRecordStatus
Test vote: creates vote, replaces existing vote, cannot vote on own
Test removeVote: removes vote, returns updated score
Test download: creates copy, records download, cannot download twice
Test marketplace.getById: returns public strategy, 404 for private
Test report: creates report, cannot report own, cannot report twice
userStories.notes: Created comprehensive marketplace.test.ts with tests for publish/unpublish, list, getById, vote/removeVote, download, and report. Tests require Docker to run (testcontainers). Build and check pass.

userStories.title: Create Dedicated Strategy Edit Page Route
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit strategies on a dedicated page at /strategies/[id]/edit so that I have more space and a better editing experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows 404 page if strategy not found
Redirects to strategy list if not owner
Verify in browser: page loads at /strategies/[id]/edit
userStories.notes: Created edit page at /strategies/[id]/edit with loading skeleton, 404 handling, owner redirect, Terminal styling, and data-testid attributes

userStories.title: Create Cover Image Upload Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload a cover image for my strategy so that it has visual identity.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows current cover image if exists, placeholder if not
Uses useImageUpload hook with context strategy-covers
Shows upload progress via toast (existing pattern)
Updates strategy via strategies.update mutation on upload complete
Verify in browser: upload, display, and delete work
userStories.notes: Created cover-image-upload.tsx with file picker, S3 presigned URL upload, progress toast, delete functionality, and integrated into edit page

userStories.title: Build Strategy Edit Form with Auto-Save
userStories.description: As a user, I want my strategy edits to auto-save so that I don't lose work and don't need to click a save button.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows All changes saved with timestamp after save
Reverts to Unsaved changes if auto-save fails
Fields are spacious with breathing room
Verify in browser: edits auto-save with status indicator
userStories.notes: Created strategy-edit-form.tsx with debounced auto-save (500ms), save status indicator, name/description/color fields

userStories.title: Build Rules Editor Section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit strategy rules in the spacious edit page so that I can document my entry/exit criteria.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays rules grouped by category (entry, exit, risk, management)
Verify in browser: CRUD operations work, drag-and-drop works
userStories.notes: Created rules-editor.tsx with dnd-kit drag-and-drop, inline editing, delete confirmation, optimistic updates. Added addRule, updateRule, deleteRule, reorderRules endpoints to strategies router.

userStories.title: Build Risk Parameters Section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit risk management parameters in the spacious edit page so that I can document my risk rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Sections for: position sizing, max risk per trade, daily loss limit
Position sizing: method dropdown (fixed, risk_percent, kelly) with relevant inputs
Max risk: type dropdown (dollars, percent) with value input
Daily loss limit: type dropdown (dollars, percent) with value input
Verify in browser: all inputs work, values persist
userStories.notes: Created risk-parameters-editor.tsx with position sizing (fixed/risk_percent/kelly), max risk per trade, daily loss limit, max concurrent positions, min R:R ratio. All fields auto-save via strategies.autosave with debounce.

userStories.title: Assemble Strategy Edit Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want the edit page to have a spacious, visually appealing layout so that editing feels premium.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit page layout: full-width cover image at top, strategy name as large editable heading, tabbed sections, back link
Overview tab: description, color, instruments, categories
Risk Management tab: risk parameters editor
Advanced tab: scaling rules, trailing rules (placeholder for future)
Verify in browser: full edit flow works
userStories.notes: Restructured edit page with 4 tabs (Overview, Rules, Risk Management, Advanced). Extended StrategyEditForm with instruments and categories multi-select using popover checkboxes. Responsive layout with icons on mobile.

userStories.title: Update Strategy Detail Page with Cover Image
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the cover image prominently on the strategy detail page so that strategies have visual identity.
acceptanceCriteria: Display cover image as hero banner at top (or gradient placeholder if none)
Strategy name overlays cover image (with text shadow for readability)
Strategy color as accent on the page
Keep existing stats and performance sections
Verify in browser: cover image displays correctly
userStories.notes: Added hero banner with cover image/gradient placeholder, strategy name overlay with text shadow, Edit button linking to edit page, strategy color accent on stats cards. Added data-testid attributes for E2E testing.

userStories.title: Add Publish to Marketplace Section
userStories.description: As a user, I want a section to publish my strategy to the marketplace from the detail page so that I can share it with the community.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Share to Marketplace card section on strategy detail page
If < 20 trades: show disabled state with message and progress indicator (12/20 trades)
If not published (and >= 20 trades): shows Publish button with anonymous toggle, instrument selection, category selection
If published: shows Published badge with vote score, download count, track record badge, Unpublish button, marketplace link
Verify in browser: publish/unpublish flow works, minimum trades enforced
userStories.notes: Created MarketplaceSection component with disabled/publish/published states. Integrated into strategy detail page. Uses strategies.publish/unpublish mutations and fetches marketplace.getById for engagement stats.

userStories.title: Create Marketplace Page Route
userStories.description: As a user, I want a marketplace page at /marketplace where I can browse public strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Uses infinite scroll with marketplace.list query
Shows empty state if no strategies
Terminal design styling with hero section and gradient orbs
Verify in browser: page loads, shows strategies
userStories.notes: Created marketplace page with hero section, infinite scroll using marketplace.list query, loading skeleton, empty state, and placeholder strategy cards. Terminal design with gradient orbs.

userStories.title: Build Marketplace Filter Bar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter and search marketplace strategies so that I can find relevant strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear filters button when filters active
Verify in browser: filters work, persist in URL
userStories.notes: Created filter-bar.tsx with search (debounced 300ms), instrument/category multi-select popovers, sort dropdown, clear filters button, URL persistence. Integrated into marketplace page with Suspense wrapper.

userStories.title: Build Marketplace Strategy Card
userStories.description: As a user, I want attractive strategy cards in the marketplace so that I can quickly evaluate strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows cover image (or gradient placeholder with color)
Track record badge: limited (20-29 trades warning), normal (no badge), verified (100+ green badge)
Stats row: Win Rate, Profit Factor, Total Trades
Vote controls (up/down arrows with net score)
Click links to marketplace detail page
Terminal design styling with hover effects
Verify in browser: cards render correctly with appropriate badges
userStories.notes: Created strategy-card.tsx with cover image/gradient placeholder, track record badges (verified/limited), stats row, vote controls with optimistic updates, category badges, instrument badges, download count. Integrated into marketplace page replacing placeholder component.

userStories.title: Implement Voting UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upvote and downvote strategies so that I can surface quality content.
acceptanceCriteria: Vote buttons on marketplace cards and detail page
Upvote arrow: highlights chartreuse when active
Downvote arrow: highlights red when active
Click toggles vote (clicking same arrow removes vote)
Cannot vote on own strategy (buttons disabled/hidden)
Login required toast if not authenticated
Verify in browser: voting works with optimistic updates
userStories.notes: Extended VoteControls with isOwner and size props. Marketplace.list returns currentUserId for ownership detection. Detail page voting will reuse VoteControls (US-030).

userStories.title: Build Marketplace Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a detail page for marketplace strategies so that I can see full information before downloading.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section with cover image, name, creator info
Track record badge (same logic as card)
Performance stats with warning if limited status
Download to My Strategies button (or Already Downloaded with link)
Report button with dialog: reason dropdown, details textarea, submit calls strategies.report
Verify in browser: full detail view works, report flow works
userStories.notes: Created marketplace detail page with hero section, track record badge, full description, rules display (grouped by category), risk parameters display, performance stats with limited data warning, vote controls (reusing VoteControls component), download button with Already Downloaded state, report dialog with reason dropdown and details textarea. Added currentUserId to marketplace.getById for ownership detection.

userStories.title: Implement Download Flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want to download/copy a strategy to my account so that I can use it.
acceptanceCriteria: Download button on marketplace detail page
Confirmation dialog: This will copy the strategy to your account
Success: redirects to the new strategy's detail page
Success toast: Strategy downloaded! You can now customize it.
Verify in browser: download creates copy, redirects correctly
userStories.notes: Added DownloadConfirmDialog component with confirmation message, list of what gets copied, Cancel/Confirm buttons, loading state. Dialog uses strategy color for accent. Existing download mutation already handles success redirect and toast.

userStories.title: Add Marketplace to Navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want marketplace accessible from the main navigation so that I can easily find it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Marketplace link to sidebar navigation
Active state when on marketplace routes
Terminal design styling matches other nav items
Verify in browser: nav link works, highlights correctly
userStories.notes: Added Marketplace nav item with Store icon. Fixed isActive to use startsWith for sub-route detection (/marketplace/[id]).

userStories.title: Update Strategy Cards on Main Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want strategy cards on the main strategies page to show if a strategy is published so that I can see my public strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Show Public badge if isPublic is true
Show vote score and download count if public
Verify in browser: badges show on public strategies
userStories.notes: Added Public badge with Globe icon, Downloaded badge for marketplace copies, engagement stats (votes/downloads) for public strategies. Extended strategies.getAll router to fetch engagement data.

userStories.title: Show Source Strategy Attribution
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which strategies I downloaded from the marketplace so that I remember their origin.
acceptanceCriteria: On strategy detail page, if sourceStrategyId exists: show Downloaded from Marketplace badge, link to original (if still public), show original creator (if not anonymous)
On strategy cards, show small Downloaded indicator if from marketplace
Verify in browser: attribution displays correctly
userStories.notes: Added attribution section on strategy detail page with badge, link to original, creator info. Downloaded badge on cards was already added in US-033.

userStories.title: Create Reusable NullableNumberInput Component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable number input component that properly handles edge cases (0, negatives, empty/null values) so that form inputs work intuitively.
acceptanceCriteria: Component uses internal string state while typing (not controlled number)
Allows typing 0 without it being cleared
Validates and converts to number on blur (not on every keystroke)
Props: value: number | null, onChange: (value: number | null) => void
Props: placeholder, min, max, step, label (for error toast context)
Error handling with toast: invalid number, below min, above max
On validation error, revert input to previous valid value
userStories.notes: Created NullableNumberInput component with internal string state, blur validation, toast errors, min/max constraints. Uses inputMode=decimal and type=text for intuitive number entry.

userStories.title: Refactor RiskParametersEditor to Use NullableNumberInput
userStories.description: As a user, I want the risk parameters form inputs to allow typing 0 and clearing values so that I can configure my risk settings properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace all <Input type=number> in risk-parameters-editor.tsx with NullableNumberInput
Inputs for: fixedSize, riskPercent, kellyFraction, maxRiskValue, dailyLossValue, maxConcurrentPositions, minRRRatio
Can clear any field to empty (null)
Placeholders look distinct from actual values (muted styling)
Autosave still triggers correctly on blur
Verify in browser: all number inputs work correctly
userStories.notes: Replaced all Input type=number with NullableNumberInput. State types changed from string to number|null. buildRiskParameters simplified to use direct number values instead of parsing strings.

userStories.title: Convert Strategy Detail Page to Read-Only View
userStories.description: As a user, I want the strategy detail page (/strategies/[id]) to show a read-only view of my strategy so that viewing and editing are separate concerns.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace with read-only display sections: Overview (name, description, color), Rules (grouped by category), Risk Parameters (key-value pairs)
Keep existing: hero banner, stats cards, marketplace section, attribution section
Edit button prominently displayed, links to /strategies/[id]/edit
Terminal design styling with terminal-wrapped sections
Verify in browser: page is fully read-only, Edit button works
userStories.notes: Replaced StrategyForm with read-only sections: Description, instrument/category badges, RulesDisplay (grouped by entry/exit/risk/management), RiskParametersDisplay (key-value pairs), and legacy entry/exit criteria.

userStories.title: Add Duplicate Confirmation Modal with Rename
userStories.description: As a user, I want a confirmation modal when duplicating a strategy so that I can rename the copy before it's created.
acceptanceCriteria: On Duplicate button click, open confirmation dialog (not immediate action)
Dialog shows: Title 'Duplicate Strategy', description, editable name input pre-filled with '[name] (Copy)'
strategies.duplicate mutation accepts optional name parameter
Update tRPC router to accept { id: string, name?: string } input
If name provided, use it; otherwise default to '[name] (Copy)'
On success: redirect to new strategy detail page
Verify in browser: modal opens, rename works, duplicate creates with custom name
userStories.notes: Added confirmation dialog with name input, extended duplicate mutation to accept optional name parameter, added data-testid attributes for E2E testing

userStories.title: Add Optimistic Updates for Strategy Color Changes
userStories.description: As a user, I want color changes to reflect immediately in the UI so that editing feels responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: In strategy-edit-form.tsx, implement optimistic update for color field
Use utils.strategies.getById.setData() for immediate UI update
On mutation success: invalidate to sync with server
On mutation error: revert to previous value, show error toast
Color swatch in header updates immediately when color changed
Strategy card color updates after navigating back to list
Verify in browser: color changes reflect instantly

userStories.title: Fix Button Nesting Bug in StrategyEditForm
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to fix the hydration error caused by nesting a Checkbox (button) inside a button element.
acceptanceCriteria: In strategy-edit-form.tsx, locate instrument/category selection with Checkbox inside button
Refactor to use div with onClick handler instead of button wrapping Checkbox
Use role=button, tabIndex=0, onKeyDown for accessibility
No console hydration errors about button nesting
Selection behavior unchanged (clicking row toggles checkbox)
Verify in browser: no hydration errors, selection works

userStories.title: Redesign Strategies List Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want the strategies list page (/strategies) to have a modern, visually appealing design consistent with the homepage and analytics pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add hero section with: grid-bg pattern, gradient glow orb, section label badge, heading with accent
Strategy cards with improved styling: cover image/gradient, stats row, Public/Downloaded badges, hover lift effect
Improved empty state matching design system
Verify in browser: page matches design system, feels polished

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Strategy Edit Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the strategy edit page so that we can verify the edit flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test navigating to edit page from strategy detail
Test auto-save indicator shows when editing fields
Test tab navigation (Overview, Rules, Risk Management, Advanced)
All UI elements have data-testid attributes

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the strategy detail page so that we can verify the read-only view and marketplace section work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test strategy detail page loads with hero banner
Test Edit button navigates to edit page
Test marketplace section displays correct state
Test attribution section shows for downloaded strategies
All UI elements have data-testid attributes

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Marketplace Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the marketplace page so that we can verify browsing and filtering strategies works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test marketplace page loads with hero section
Test filter bar: search, instrument filter, category filter, sort dropdown
Test strategy cards display with correct information
Test navigation to strategy detail page
Test empty state when no results
All UI elements have data-testid attributes

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Marketplace Strategy Detail Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the marketplace strategy detail page so that we can verify the download and report flows work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test marketplace detail page loads with strategy info
Test download button opens confirmation dialog
Test report button opens report dialog
Test Already Downloaded state shows link to copy
Test back link returns to marketplace
All UI elements have data-testid attributes

userStories.title: E2E Tests for Strategies List Page
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned strategies list page so that we can verify the new design works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test strategies page loads with hero section
Test strategy cards display with cover images/gradients
Test public badge shows on published strategies
Test downloaded badge shows on marketplace copies
Test navigation to strategy detail page
Test empty state when no strategies
All UI elements have data-testid attributes
